message:
perf: WASM build infra + engine optimizations

Build infrastructure:
- Combine Zig WASM + TypeScript into single `pnpm build`
- Add Zig 0.15.2 to CI, untrack WASM binary from git
- Fix Zig 0.15 compat: flate decompress, readU64LE import, fingerprint
- Add strip + unwind_tables for smaller WASM binary

WASM engine performance:
- Switch to WasmAllocator (purpose-built for WASM linear memory)
- Add FNV-1a hash table to buffer pool for O(1) lookups (was O(n))
- Fix recursive eviction bug in buffer pool (potential stack overflow)
- Add SIMD column filtering with @Vector(2, i64/f64) per-op dispatch
- Replace per-element column reads with @memcpy for sequential access

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,12 @@ jobs:
 
       - run: pnpm install
 
-      - name: Type check
+      - name: Install Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Build (WASM + TypeScript)
         run: pnpm build
 
       - name: Unit tests
@@ -42,6 +47,14 @@ jobs:
 
       - run: pnpm install
 
+      - name: Install Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Build (WASM + TypeScript)
+        run: pnpm build
+
       - name: Generate benchmark data
         run: npx tsx scripts/generate-bench-data.ts

@@ -13,11 +13,14 @@
   },
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "wrangler dev",
-    "build": "tsc",
+    "prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build",
+    "build": "pnpm run build:wasm && tsc",
+    "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && cp zig-out/bin/querymode.wasm ../src/wasm/",
+    "build:ts": "tsc",
     "test": "vitest run",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
-    "deploy": "wrangler deploy",
-    "wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm && cp zig-out/bin/querymode.wasm ../src/wasm/",
+    "deploy": "pnpm run build && wrangler deploy",
+    "wasm": "pnpm run build:wasm",
     "bench:seed": "npx tsx scripts/seed-local-r2.ts",
     "bench": "npx tsx scripts/bench.ts"
   },
